name: @operaclinic/shared
description: Shared contracts used across OperaClinic apps for aesthetic clinic operations.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); require('fs').rmSync('tsconfig.tsbuildinfo', { force: true });" && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); require('fs').rmSync('tsconfig.tsbuildinfo', { force: true });" && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.clean: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); require('fs').rmSync('tsconfig.tsbuildinfo', { force: true });"
